questions: tell me about energy storage systems
answers: Energy storage captures energy produced at one time for use at another. Technologies include batteries, pumped hydro, compressed air, flywheels, and thermal storage.
Energy storage holo energy produce kore save kore rakhha porer jonno. Solar ar wind energy store kora lage karon era always available thake na.
Energy storage is critical for renewable energy integration. It helps balance supply and demand on the power grid, stores excess solar/wind energy, and provides backup during outages.
Major energy storage technologies include lithium-ion batteries, pumped hydroelectric storage, compressed air systems, and hydrogen storage. Grid-scale storage is essential for a clean energy future.
